source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter or Source Sans for compact knowledge UI with serif display accents for archive titles and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, tabular numbers, and reference-heavy reading hierarchy.
layout: Precise 8px grids, feather-barb dividers, stone-slab panels, serious archive navigation, compact citation tables, and blue-sheen focus states.

prompts.label: Transparent Raven feather motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Raven transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated raven feather motif for a design-system catalog: one complete raven flight feather, no bird body, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A realistic single raven feather with accurate feather anatomy, deep black barbs, subtle blue-black iridescent sheen, graphite gray shaft, tiny natural edge irregularities, mountain-forest cool reflected light, crisp silhouette edges, and tactile fine barb texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show full tip, shaft, and base without cropping; slight elegant diagonal orientation suitable as a serious knowledge-system catalog motif.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves black feather detail, blue sheen highlights, stone-gray shaft, and natural microtexture.
Transparent workflow: place the feather on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no raven body, no forest background, no mountain, no parchment, no quill pen, no ink, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Raven light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Raven" / "Raven Feather", a serious knowledge system derived from a realistic black raven feather with blue iridescent sheen, stone-gray shaft, and mountain-forest context.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from raven feather structure. The board must visibly respect these motif colors: Corvid Black #111318, Blue Sheen #214d63, Stone Slate #58636b, Mist Paper #f2f4f2, Forest Moss #4f5d47, Granite Line #c7cbc6, Quill Graphite #2a2f35, Signal Lichen #b5c46a, and Warning Rowan #b85b45.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, target 3840x2160. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Raven", motif story, palette swatches with hex labels, typography, Japanese typography with 日本語 UI examples, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts for a knowledge system, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, token samples, and generated asset examples.
Typography: English guidance for Inter or Source Sans style product UI with serif display accents for archive titles; Japanese guidance for Noto Sans JP, clear labels, tabular numbers, and readable reference hierarchy.
UI style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product system, serious and archival, precise 8px grid, 8px radius, feather-barb divider lines, stone-slab surfaces, blue-sheen focus rings, corvid black text, granite borders, moss secondary states, lichen highlights, restrained mountain-forest textures.
Sample product context: research archive and field knowledge system with collections, citations, observation logs, mountain forest sites, specimen records, confidence scores, alerts, and reading queues.
Text: use short readable UI labels; no paragraphs. Include English and Japanese guidance clearly.
Constraints: no cartoon raven, no full bird illustration dominating the board, no gothic horror styling, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no other animals.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Raven dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Raven" / "Raven Feather". It must feel like the same serious knowledge system translated to dark mode, derived from a realistic black raven feather with blue iridescent sheen, stone-gray shaft, and mountain-forest context.
Reference use: Preserve these motif-derived palette roles, component language, feather-barb texture, stone-slab surfaces, precise 8px grid, 8px radius, and Japanese/English typography guidance from the light board. Palette roles: Corvid Black #111318, Blue Sheen #214d63, Stone Slate #58636b, Mist Paper #f2f4f2, Forest Moss #4f5d47, Granite Line #c7cbc6, Quill Graphite #2a2f35, Signal Lichen #b5c46a, and Warning Rowan #b85b45.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, target 3840x2160. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Raven", "Dark Mode", palette swatches with hex labels, typography, Japanese typography with 日本語 UI examples, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts for a knowledge system, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, token samples, and generated asset examples.
Visual details: deep corvid black and quill graphite backgrounds, mist-paper text, blue-sheen focus rings, forest-moss secondary states, lichen highlights, rowan warning/destructive states, granite borders, subtle raven-feather barb grain, stone-slate cards, mountain-forest texture samples, precise shadcn/tweakcn controls.
Sample product context: research archive and field knowledge system with collections, citations, observation logs, mountain forest sites, specimen records, confidence scores, alerts, and reading queues.
Text: short readable UI labels; include English and Japanese guidance clearly.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black, no cartoon raven, no gothic horror styling, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no other animals.
